steps: The phrase 'two thousand and thirty-six' means 2000 + 36 = 2036. In figures, that is written as 2036. Check each option: A) 2306 is two thousand three hundred six, B) 2036 matches, C) 2360 is two thousand three hundred sixty, D) 20036 is twenty thousand thirty-six, E) 2063 is two thousand sixty-three. Only B matches the given number.
